# Extração: 05-10X Instagram - Account Setup Checklist

- **Fonte:** 05-10X Instagram - Account Setup Checklist.pdf
- **Tipo:** PDF
- **Páginas:** 0
- **Tamanho:** 2.74 MB

---

Pick a username (unique handle on Instagram)
Pick an Account Name (your name or business name)
Add a profile picture (headshot or company logo)
Write a short bio (optionally add tags or hashtag)
Add a website link (your “link in bio”)
Switch to business profile (in settings)
Link Facebook account (optional, but recommended)
Choose a category for your profile (to help get found)
Add email address and/or phone number (optional)
Add action buttons (if relevant to your business)
Edit display settings (show category or contact buttons)
PROFILE AND ACCOUNT SETUP:
Create plan for what stories to display (unlimited, in any desired order)
Make icons/images for Story Highlight menu items (1:1 dimension)
Add images and/or videos to each Story Highlight (up to 100 each)
Be sure to add link stickers strategically throughout Story Highlights
ADD STORY HIGHLIGHTS:
When complete… start pumping out content!
